name: Cowboy Copas
description: '''Lloyd Estel Copas''' (July 15, 1913 – March 5, 1963), known by his stage name '''Cowboy Copas''', was an American [[country music]] singer. He was popular from the 1940s until his death in the [[1963 Camden PA-24 crash|1963 plane crash]] that also killed country stars [[Patsy Cline]] and [[Hawkshaw Hawkins]]. Copas was a member of the [[Grand Ole Opry]].
